exhibits.name: List of State Administrators/Agents for Service of Process
Operating Agreement with Undertaking and Guarantee, Ownership Addendum, Relocation Addendum, Renewal Addendum, and State Addenda
exhibits.notes: Core franchise agreement. State addenda within: Illinois, Minnesota, North Dakota, Washington, Wisconsin, and Sample Release. Includes personal guarantee (Undertaking and Guarantee) signed by all owners.

exhibits.name: Conversion Addenda
exhibits.notes: NSF conversion addendum, soft-serve only conversion addendum, limited system food conversion addendum

exhibits.name: Multiple Unit Agreement (MultiTRA)
exhibits.notes: Multiple trade area reservation agreement for multi-unit development. Entities only, not individuals.

exhibits.name: Third-Party Agreements Related to the EPOS System
exhibits.notes: ParTech Participation Agreement, ValueLink gift card agreement, Olo mobile ordering, Punchh loyalty, Acumera firewall, Cineplex digital menu boards

exhibits.name: Design Services Agreement
exhibits.notes: For prototypical design intent plans. Free if full franchise fee paid; $3,000 if reduced/no fee.

exhibits.name: Construction Consultation Services Agreement
exhibits.notes: Required for all preopening construction. Free if full franchise fee paid; up to $7,500 if reduced/no fee.

exhibits.name: Tables of Contents for Manuals
exhibits.notes: Operations Manual is 469 pages total. Confidential and proprietary.

exhibits.name: Lists of franchises (current operational)
exhibits.notes: All operational direct-licensed and subfranchised DQ G&C, Brazier, and Texas DQ franchises as of Dec 31, 2024. PII — not to be published.

exhibits.name: Lists of franchisees whose franchise agreements were terminated or transferred
exhibits.notes: 46 former franchisees: 28 DQ G&C/Brazier, 14 Texas DQ, 4 subfranchised. Fiscal year 2024. Some have confidentiality restrictions. PII — not to be published.

exhibits.name: Financial Statements (with Guarantee of Performance)
exhibits.notes: IDQ consolidated financial statements for FY 2022-2024. Audited by Deloitte & Touche LLP (clean opinion, Feb 7, 2025). Includes Guarantee of Performance by IDQ (page 508).

exhibits.name: Receipts
exhibits.notes: State effective dates page and two detachable receipt pages

michigan_notice_in_front_matter.notes: Michigan statutory notice regarding unfair franchise provisions
